clips.title: The Album
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. A cozy dim living room, warm lamplight, an old photo album open on a lap. A person turns the pages of the album with a wistful, tender smile, lost in memory, eyes soft. A person in a cardigan. Warm amber light, soft haze, nostalgic mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Record
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. A vintage room with a record player, shelves of vinyl, warm evening light. A person lowers the needle onto a spinning record, eyes closing with a wistful, nostalgic smile as the music starts. A person in retro-style clothes. Warm amber light, soft glow, nostalgic mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Bedroom
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. A childhood bedroom preserved in time, old posters, faded toys, warm afternoon light through curtains. A person stands looking around wistfully, touching an old keepsake, flooded with memory. A person in casual clothes. Warm nostalgic light, dust motes, nostalgic mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Porch
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. An old wooden porch at dusk, a creaking swing, warm golden light, fireflies. A person rocks gently on the porch swing with a wistful, faraway look, remembering. A person in comfortable clothes. Warm golden dusk light, soft glow, nostalgic mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Window
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. A rain-streaked window, soft grey daylight, a cup of tea steaming. A person gazes out at the rain with a wistful, nostalgic expression, cradling the warm cup, memories surfacing. A person in a soft sweater. Soft cool light with warm accents, nostalgic mood, 85mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Fair
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm nostalgic grade. A small-town fair at golden dusk, a glowing vintage carousel, string lights. A person stands watching the carousel turn with a wistful, tender smile, remembering simpler days. A person in casual clothes. Warm golden light, glowing bulbs, nostalgic mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
